name: Button
description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.
previewHtml: <button class='inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-900/90 h-10 px-4 py-2'>Shadcn Button</button>

name: Card
description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.
previewHtml:
Card Title

Make changes to your account here. Click save when you're done.

name: Input
description: Displays a form input field or a component that looks like an input field.
previewHtml: <input type='email' placeholder='Email' class='flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-gray-600 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-gray-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 text-white max-w-xs' />

name: Avatar
description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.
previewHtml: CN

name: Badge
description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.
previewHtml: New

name: MUI Button
description: Material Design buttons allow users to take actions, and make choices, with a single tap.
previewHtml: <button style='background-color:#1976d2;color:#fff;padding:6px 16px;border-radius:4px;border:none;box-shadow:0px 3px 1px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0px 1px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);font-family:Roboto, sans-serif;font-weight:500;font-size:0.875rem;line-height:1.75;letter-spacing:0.02857em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;'>MUI BUTTON</button>

name: MUI TextField
description: Text fields let users enter and edit text.
importCode:
import TextField from '@mui/material/TextField';

<TextField id="outlined-basic" label="Outlined" variant="outlined" />

name: Chakra Button
description: Button component is used to trigger an action or event, such as submitting a form or canceling an action.
previewHtml: <button style='background-color:#319795;color:#fff;font-family:-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;font-weight:600;height:2.5rem;min-width:2.5rem;font-size:1rem;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;border-radius:0.375rem;border:none;cursor:pointer;'>Chakra Button</button>

name: Chakra Switch
description: The Switch component is used as an alternative for the Checkbox component.
importCode:
import { Switch, FormControl, FormLabel } from '@chakra-ui/react'

<FormControl display='flex' alignItems='center'>
  <FormLabel htmlFor='email-alerts' mb='0'>
    Enable email alerts?
  </FormLabel>
  <Switch id='email-alerts' />
</FormControl>

name: NextUI Button
description: Buttons allow users to perform actions and choose with a single tap.
previewHtml: <button style='background:linear-gradient(to right, #FF0080, #7928CA);color:white;border:none;border-radius:9999px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;font-weight:500;box-shadow:0 4px 14px 0 rgba(255, 0, 128, 0.39);cursor:pointer;'>NextUI Gradient</button>

name: Radix Dialog
description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, rendering the content underneath inert.
previewHtml:
Edit Profile

Make changes to your profile here.
importCode:
import * as Dialog from '@radix-ui/react-dialog';

<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger>Open</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Portal>
    <Dialog.Overlay />
    <Dialog.Content>
      <Dialog.Title>Dialog Title</Dialog.Title>
      <Dialog.Description>Dialog Description</Dialog.Description>
      <Dialog.Close>Close</Dialog.Close>
    </Dialog.Content>
  </Dialog.Portal>
</Dialog.Root>

name: MUI Snackbar
description: Snackbars provide brief notifications.
previewHtml: Note archived

name: Chakra Spinner
description: Spinners provide a visual cue that an action is processing awaiting a course of change or a result.

name: Shadcn Toast
description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.
previewHtml:
Scheduled: Catch up

Friday, February 10, 2024 at 5:57 PM

name: MUI Card
description: Cards contain content and actions about a single subject.
previewHtml:
Lizard
Lizards are a widespread group of squamate reptiles, with over 6,000 species.
importCode:
import Card from '@mui/material/Card';
import CardContent from '@mui/material/CardContent';

<Card sx={{ minWidth: 275 }}>
  <CardContent>
    Typography elements here
  </CardContent>
</Card>
